prompt: A restocking AMR refills shelves while a drone verifies stock levels. The drone can only scan shelves when the AMR is idle. Both must stop if any obstacle is detected within 1 meters.
constraints: StockDrone scans only when RestockAMR is idle
Amr must stop if any obstacle is detected within 1 meters
Drone must stop if any obstacle is detected within 1 meters

results.constraint: StockDrone scans only when RestockAMR is idle

generation.raw_text:
{
    "query": "(StockDrone.scanning) --> (RestockAMR.idle)",
    "explanation": "This UPPAAL query captures the conditional response where StockDrone's scanning action only occurs when RestockAMR is idle. The operator '-->' ensures that if StockDrone is scanning, it will eventually lead to RestockAMR being idle.",
    "confidence": 0.85,
    "pattern_used": "conditional_response",
    "operator_used": ["-->"]
    }

uppaal_result.explanation: This UPPAAL query captures the conditional response where StockDrone's scanning action only occurs when RestockAMR is idle. The operator '-->' ensures that if StockDrone is scanning, it will eventually lead to RestockAMR being idle.

results.constraint: Amr must stop if any obstacle is detected within 1 meters

  "query": "A[] (Amr.obstacle_detected imply Amr.stopped)",

  "pattern_used": "safety_immediate_response",
  "operator_used": ["imply"]
}
